title: The Pigstep Remix (AvM Remix for Pigstep)
description: This datapack and resourcepack remixes the Pigstep music by switching it to the AvM (Animation VS Minecraft) version by Alan Becker and Scott Buckley.
body:
### Hello fellow user!
Today i introduce you The Pigstep Remix!
This datapack/resourcepack changes the default pigstep sound to the AvM remix made by Alan Becker, Scott Buckley and Aaron Grooves. This makes your experience with Pigstep longer and better.
### Where it came from?
This music came from a series called Animation Vs Minecraft (AvM), which was made by Alan Becker on youtube. The music came from the _[Episode 25](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8kiPjEeTaW4)_ of the series. One of the producer of the music also posted it on their own channel so you can clearly hear it as you can see _[here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oDZK3_c-Vkc)_.
### How to play it?
First download the datapack from here and put it on your datapacks folder, then clone it and add the copy to your resourcepacks folder. The datapack makes the jukebox music stays for long enough so the music dont cut out of nowhere, and the resourcepacks changes the pigstep sound overriding the default pigstep and adding the remix into it.

### Another way to use it on public servers
You see, if you join a normal server that does not use this datapack, the music will cut off. But if you can install a mod called Jukebox Custom Disc Fix, it will fix the cut off in any server, which you can download it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/jukebox-custom-disc-fix).

**Have fun!**
